---
name: Translation Error / Übersetzungsfehler
about: Report a wrong translation or typo (EN/DE/NL)
title: '[TRANSLATION]: '
labels: documentation
assignees: Archie-Automation
---

### 📍 Location / Ort / Locatie
*Where did you find the error? (e.g. Login screen, Export menu)*

### ❌ Current text / Aktueller Text / Huidige tekst
*What is written there now?*

### ✅ Suggested correction / Korrekturvorschlag / Voorgestelde correctie
*What should it be?*

### 💡 Context (Optional)
*Why is the current translation incorrect? (e.g. "In KNX terms we usually use...")*
